profile.summary: FP&A analyst with forecasting, variance analysis, and Excel modelling.

jobDescription: Cedar Health Group is hiring an FP&A Analyst for monthly forecasting, variance analysis, and Excel models that support leadership. Experience in healthcare or services finance preferred.
cvText:
Morgan Lee
Financial Analyst

Experience:
- FP&A Analyst at GreenField Clinics (2021-2025)
- Owned monthly forecast and variance packs for clinic ops
- Built Excel driver-based models for headcount and revenue

Skills: Excel, FP&A, forecasting, variance analysis, PowerPoint
Education: BSc Accounting, Lakeside University; ACCA Part-Qualified
baselineCoverLetter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am applying for the FP&A Analyst role at Cedar Health Group. At GreenField Clinics I owned monthly forecasts and variance analysis and built Excel driver-based models for revenue and headcount.

Healthcare FP&A is familiar territory for me and I would welcome the chance to support your leadership pack.

Sincerely,
Morgan Lee
